## Meeting Purpose

[Align on GrowthX's role in Udemy Business's content strategy and website experience](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to integrate with existing UB SEO/content plans, not create separate workstreams](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [New content hub planned within business.udemy.com, refreshing current resource center](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop content; UB team (Justin/Patricia) to review for SEO/brand alignment](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
  - [Exploring interactive lead magnet ideas (e.g. skills fluency planner) to drive engagement](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Capabilities and Focus

  - [Specializes in scaling quality content production using AI+human workflows](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Helps build "organic engines" to accelerate content creation and learning](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Initially proposed AI-native teams publication, now broadening to skills/AI focus](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Will assist with content strategy, creation, and driving traffic; not web development](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)

### Content Hub Vision

  - [Refresh existing UB resource center with more engaging, branded experience](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Examples shared: Kanji, Mixpanel, Rippling - sub-navigation, visual themes](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [Aim for cohesive theme tying together SEO content, resources, newsletter](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Must balance design improvements with site speed considerations](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

### Content Development Process

  - [GrowthX delivered first "calibration article" for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
  - [Will ramp up production as alignment on style/expectations solidifies](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [Justin and Patricia to be key reviewers for SEO and brand voice respectively](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)
  - [Content to be added to existing site structure until new experience ready](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)

### Lead Generation Ideas

  - [Exploring interactive "skills fluency planner" concept](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Would serve both prospects and customers with actionable insights](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Potential to gate full strategy unlock as sales hook](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Aim to create high-value lead magnet to improve top-of-funnel metrics](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)

### Team Roles and Collaboration

  - [Justin to align GrowthX efforts with existing SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Patricia to focus on core Udemy narrative/thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)
  - [GrowthX to handle bulk of SEO-driven content production](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Stef to approve final content strategy and team responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle and Justin to meet to align GrowthX efforts with existing SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Define clear review process and responsibilities (Justin/Patricia)](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1997.0)
  - [Clarify GrowthX engagement terms and timeline](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)
  - [Explore technical feasibility of interactive lead magnet concept](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Begin regular content publication on existing site structure](https://fathom.video/share/AcqoaH5o4LCGxv13JysF3CsS8UxUgwfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
